name: io.github.faegents/bgg-mcp
title: BoardGameGeek MCP Server
description: BoardGameGeek MCP server providing access to BGG API data through standardized tools. Extended with play history, game family/series lookup, and BGCollector graph intelligence.

environmentVariables.name: BGG_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for BoardGameGeek authentication (recommended). Obtain from https://boardgamegeek.com/applications

environmentVariables.name: BGG_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: Cookie string for BGG authentication (alternative to API key).

environmentVariables.name: BGG_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your BoardGameGeek username for references such as ME or MY in prompts

environmentVariables.name: BGC_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: BGCollector FastAPI backend URL for NLP search and graph recommendations (default: http://localhost:8000)
